Localization.Description: Use of Powershell remoting (WinRM) for remote command execution is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Use of Powershell remoting (WinRM) to remotely execute commands on host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} is detected
Use of Powershell remoting (WinRM) to remotely execute commands on host {event_src.host} as the user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} is detected
